name: Khodijah, C.BQT., C.PQT., C.EQT., C.TMiQ.
specialty: Certified Excellent in Qur'an Teacher; Certified Trainer of Memorize in Qur'an
bio:
1. Guru Tahsin dan Tahfizh di Ponpes

2. Tasmi' matan Tuhfatul Athfal dan Jazariyyah

3. Proses pengambilan sanad matan Jazariyyah dan syarahannya

4. Proses pengambilan sanad al Qur'an 30 juz binnazhor riwayat Hafs dan Syu'bah 'an 'Ashim min thoriq asy Syathibiyyah (on-going)
